main.name: Wichayut Laorod
main.description: A highly motivated Software Engineering graduate with experience collaborating with companies as part of coursework since sophomore year and completing a cooperative education program in the final year. Proficient in front-end development, specializing in React.js, with a solid understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies. Strong adaptability, teamwork skills, and the ability to thrive in dynamic environments.

aboutMe.desc: Front-end Developer & Full-stack Developer | A passionate recent graduate eager to create engaging digital experiences.
aboutMe.name: Wichayut Laorod

intro.line1: Hello! I'm a Front-end and Full-stack developer who recently graduated with a bachelor's degree and am eager to start my career in the tech industry.
intro.line2: During my studies, I learned and developed skills to create user-friendly and visually appealing websites and applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
intro.line3: I believe good design and simple functionality can provide a great user experience, and that's what I strive to achieve in every project I work on.

experience.sectionSubtitle: Work experience and projects I’ve contributed to.

wrs.detail: A system used to manage information and processes related to the welfare of organizations or agencies, with the goal of facilitating the systematic and efficient administration of benefits and entitlements for employees or other relevant individuals.

helpDesk.detail: Helps manage user complaints or issues, such as IT problems or other services. It includes functions for receiving requests, tracking status, and notifying resolution results, aiming to improve service convenience and organizational problem-solving efficiency.

voteSE.detail: Used for voting on interesting projects during camp events, promoting creativity and encouraging everyone to participate in the evaluation process.

etax.detail: Supports electronic tax management, such as issuing tax invoices, online filing, and digital tax data storage. It helps reduce paperwork and enhances convenience, transparency, and speed in tax administration for both organizations and individuals.

HIE.detail: The HIE system is a platform for securely exchanging health information among medical institutions. It enhances quick and accurate access to patient history, diagnosis, and treatment, supporting effective coordination in the public health system.

CMS.detail: Enables users to easily submit issues or complaints and track their resolution status. It improves complaint management efficiency, reduces response time, and increases user satisfaction.

DSG.detail: Assess and evaluate digital skills across various areas through online tests. Identify skill gaps to develop targeted improvement plans. Ideal for learners, professionals, and organizations aiming to enhance their readiness in the digital era.
